_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6 inhibition enhances SHP2 inhibitor efficacy and is dependent upon RB function in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors

details: JH-2-031 MPNST cell line tested in context of SHP2 + CDK4/6 inhibition study; TNO155 (SHP2i) alone and TNO155 + ribociclib (CDK4/6i) combination evaluated for antiproliferative activity and downstream signaling effects
